name: HRA Calculator
description: Estimate HRA exemption based on rent and salary.
formula: Exemption = min(HRA received, rent - 10% salary, 50% salary)

example.explanation: HRA exemption is the minimum of HRA received (₹30,000), rent minus 10% salary (₹15,000), and 50% salary (₹40,000).

faqs.question: What is HRA exemption?
faqs.answer: It is the portion of House Rent Allowance that is not taxable.

faqs.question: Do I need rent receipts?
faqs.answer: Yes, most employers require rent proofs to claim HRA exemption.

faqs.question: What if I don't have rent receipts?
faqs.answer: Without proof, the entire HRA may be considered taxable income.
